name: mcdr-bridge
description: A MCDR bridge plugin connecting OPanel and MCDR
readme:
# OPanel MCDR Bridge

A MCDR bridge plugin connecting OPanel and MCDR

Please refer to the official OPanel doc [Connecting to MCDR](https://opanel.cn/en/docs/mcdr-bridge) to configure this plugin.
